name: geno-2
description: Geno-2: generative audiovisual instrument built with Rust, WebAssembly, WebGPU, and WebAudio

scripts.build: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg --out-name app_web --release && node scripts/gen-env.js && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/pkg dist/control && cp pkg/app_web.js dist/pkg/ && cp pkg/app_web_bg.wasm dist/pkg/ && cp pkg/env.js dist/pkg/env.js && cp pkg/sentry-config.js dist/pkg/sentry-config.js && cp sentry.js dist/sentry.js && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp favicon.svg dist/favicon.svg && cp control.html dist/control.html && cp control.html dist/control/index.html && cp _headers dist/_headers
scripts.ci: npm run build && (http-server -p 8080 -c-1 . >/dev/null 2>&1 & SERVER_PID=$!; trap 'kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT; node web-test.js)
scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace --all-targets
scripts.check: npm run check:rust && npm run check:diagrams && npm run ci
scripts.nuke: rm -rf .wrangler node_modules package-lock.json && npm install && npm run dev
